items.caption: A 3d rendering featuring three humanoid figures, each holding a server rack. the figure on the left is holding a server rack with a black casing and blue lights, the central figure is holding a server rack with a black casing and white lights, and the figure on the right is holding a server rack with a black casing and blue lights. the server racks are standing upright and appear to be of a similar design, with multiple shelves and compartments. the background is plain white, emphasizing the subjects. the style of the image is clean and professional, likely intended for use in a corporate or technical context.
